generated_from: expo/docs/pages/push-notifications/push-notifications-setup.mdx @ 2026-06-07. Only ONE dashboard screenshot in the whole push-notifications section: the public Expo push notifications testing tool. Route confirmed from universe: the tool is the PUBLIC page at /notifications (app/(public)/notifications/page.tsx; legacy redirect /dashboard/notifications -> /notifications). It is NOT account/project-scoped. (There is a separate project-scoped /accounts/[account]/projects/[project]/push-notifications page in the dashboard, but the docs do not screenshot it.) Theme light by luminance (249, unambiguous near-white). Everything else in this section is device/simulator app screenshots, out of scope.

screenshots.depicts: The Expo push notifications tool: a form to compose and send a test push notification (recipient token, message body, and a Send a Notification button)
screenshots.scope_note: Public push notifications tool at /notifications (no account/project token). Reachable read-only; view the form, do NOT click Send a Notification. Light by luminance (249).
